Business of Copywriting Academy
Recommended Preparatory Reading List
prepared by Dan Kennedy
These books are not listed in any priority order. Under ideal circumstances, you would read them
all in their entirety. However, you will find chapters and/or page numbers listed, for the most
salient parts. You will also soon receive, under separate cover, a copy of the galleys for my NO
B.S. WEALTH ATTRACTION book, to be published later this year, as preface to the optional
Nite-Owl Discussion Session at the Academy.
Required
THE KING OF MADISON AVENUE / Roman
Pages 4 – 8, 56 – 82, 87- 89 (re. Rubenstein), 113 – 122, 126
THE 48 LAWS OF POWER / Greene
Law #5, Law #6, Law #8, Law #11, Law #27
THICK FACE, BLACK HEART / Chu
Pages 7 -26, 167-198, 257-277
(Note: an excellent pre-requisite for this book is THE NEW PSYCHO-CYBERNETICS by Maltz & Kennedy)
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 1 of 3 --

TO BE OR NOT TO BE INTIMIDATED? / Ringer
Chapters 9 and 21
NO B.S. SALES SUCCESS IN THE NEW ECONOMY / Kennedy
Chapter 21 – mandatory. Chapter 18 – optional
UNCENSORED SALES STRATEGIES / Barrows and Kennedy
Pages 27-38, 139-160, 169-186
NO B.S. BUSINESS SUCCESS IN THE NEW ECONOMY / Kennedy
Chapters 4, 7, 12
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Optional
If interested in information marketing: as preface to the optional extra session at the Academy:
Start Your Own Information Marketing Business / Skrob, Information Marketing Assoc. and
Entrepreneur Press
Pages 45-60
The Official Get Rich Guide to Information Marketing / Kennedy, Glazer, Skrob, Information
Marketing Association
Chapters 1, 2, 3, 12
No B.S. Ruthless Management of People and Profits: The Ultimate, No Holds Barred, Kick
Butt, Take No Prisoners Guide to Really Getting Rich / Kennedy
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 3 --
